title: SaaS Pricing Page
description: Schema for SaaS product pricing page data including plans, features, and pricing models.

plan.description: An individual pricing plan or tier.

plan_name.description: Name of the pricing plan (e.g., Starter, Pro, Enterprise). Commonly found in: plan header, pricing tier name, plan card title.

price_monthly.description: Monthly price when billed monthly. Commonly found in: monthly price display, plan price card, billing toggle monthly.

price_annual_monthly.description: Monthly price when billed annually. Commonly found in: annual price display, plan price card annual view, billing toggle annual.

price_annual_total.description: Total annual price when billed annually. Commonly found in: annual total display, yearly price label, billing summary.

seats_included.description: Number of seats or users included in the plan. Commonly found in: plan details, seats/users limit, plan feature list.

seat_overage_price.description: Price per additional seat beyond the included count. Commonly found in: pricing footnote, overage pricing details, plan FAQ.

usage_limit.description: Usage limits or quotas for this plan. Commonly found in: plan details, usage limits section, plan comparison table.

features.description: List of features included in this plan. Commonly found in: plan feature list, included features section, plan comparison table.

highlighted.description: Whether this plan is visually highlighted or recommended. Commonly found in: recommended badge, most popular label, plan card highlight style.

cta_text.description: Call-to-action button text for this plan. Commonly found in: plan CTA button, get started button text, sign up button.

company_name.description: Name of the SaaS company. Commonly found in: page header, site logo, og:site_name meta tag.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the company. Commonly found in: site URL, pricing page domain, canonical URL.

pricing_model.description: Primary pricing model used. Commonly found in: pricing page structure, pricing model description, plan structure.

free_tier_available.description: Whether a free tier or free plan is available. Commonly found in: free plan badge, pricing tier list, CTA buttons.

free_trial_available.description: Whether a free trial is offered. Commonly found in: free trial CTA, trial badge, pricing page header.

trial_days.description: Number of days in the free trial. Commonly found in: trial duration text, free trial badge, pricing page FAQ.

billing_intervals.description: Available billing intervals (e.g., monthly, annual). Commonly found in: billing toggle, billing period options, pricing header.

annual_discount_percent.description: Discount percentage for annual billing. Commonly found in: billing toggle label, annual discount badge, savings callout.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for pricing. Commonly found in: price display currency symbol, currency selector, pricing footnote.

custom_pricing_available.description: Whether custom or enterprise pricing is available. Commonly found in: enterprise plan CTA, contact us for pricing, custom plan section.

plans.description: List of pricing plans available. Commonly found in: pricing plan cards, plan tier section, pricing comparison table.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
